query:
INSERT INTO media (filename, originalName, mimeType, fileSize, s3Key, url, type, uploadedBy, createdAt) VALUES 
('test1.jpg', 'test_image.jpg', 'image/jpeg', 5000, 'media/test1.jpg', 'https://justxempower-assets.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/media/test1.jpg', 'image', 'admin', NOW()),
('test2.mov', 'test_video.mov', 'video/quicktime', 50000, 'media/test2.mov', 'https://justxempower-assets.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/media/test2.mov', 'video', 'admin', NOW()),
('test3.png', 'test_image.png', 'image/png', 8000, 'media/test3.png', 'https://justxempower-assets.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/media/test3.png', 'image', 'admin', NOW());
